Objective: Tổng quan: Báo giá phát triển Admin Panel cho VCreator Global. 4 roles: Local Ops, Local Finance, Local Admin, Global Admin. Mỗi country có local ops team riêng (ADR-000). Data isolation bắt buộc.

Use case: Admin login: email/password. MFA optional (recommended cho Finance + Global Admin). Session management.
Note:
- Email/password authentication (tách biệt OAuth Creator)
- MFA optional (TOTP hoặc SMS)
- Session management: timeout configurable per role
- Logout all sessions (admin force)
- Password policy enforcement

Use case: Role-based access control: 4 roles, country-scoped, partner-scoped. API-level enforcement.
Note:
- 4 roles: global_admin, local_admin, local_finance, local_ops
- Country-scoped: local roles chỉ access data country mình
- Partner-scoped: nếu admin gắn partner → chỉ data partner đó
- API middleware enforce permissions per endpoint
- Permission matrix: role × resource × action
- Deny by default — whitelist approach

Use case: Admin panel đa ngôn ngữ: Filipino, Vietnamese, English. Dùng chung i18n framework với Creator.
Note:
- Reuse i18n framework (ADR-003)
- Admin-specific locale files
- Language switcher trong admin panel
- Fallback: English
- Đa ngôn ngữ cho labels, buttons, messages, tooltips

Use case: Immutable audit log: auto-log mọi action quan trọng. Searchable, filterable, exportable.
Note:
- Auto-log: CRUD campaigns, content moderation, KYC decisions, payment, role changes, config changes
- Immutable: không edit/delete được
- Fields: actor, action, resource, country, timestamp, IP, user_agent
- Retention policy configurable
- Performance: async write, bulk indexing

Use case: Ai đang online, recent actions, system health overview.
Note:
- Online admins per country
- Recent actions feed (realtime)
- System health: API latency, error rate
- Quick links per role

Objective: LOCAL OPS — Content Moderation & Creator Management

Use case: Queue content chờ duyệt. Sort, filter theo campaign/platform/date. Optimized cho throughput.
Note:
- Queue sortable: newest, oldest, priority
- Filter: campaign, platform (TikTok/FB/IG), date range, creator
- Count hiển thị: "245 content chờ duyệt"
- Auto-refresh khi có content mới
- Keyboard shortcuts cho power users (j/k navigate, a approve, r reject)

Use case: Xem nhanh content: thumbnail, link social, hashtag, creator info — không cần mở tab mới.
Note:
- Inline preview panel (side panel hoặc modal)
- Thumbnail/video preview
- Social media link (click-to-open)
- Hashtag verification (highlight required hashtags)
- Creator info: name, avatar, KYC status, past submissions

Use case: Approve 1-click, reject bắt buộc lý do. Request revision cho content cần sửa.
Note:
- Approve: 1-click (hoặc keyboard shortcut)
- Reject: bắt buộc chọn reason category + optional note
- Request Revision: yêu cầu sửa mà không reject hoàn toàn
- Rejection reasons: predefined list + custom
- Auto-notification to creator khi status change

Use case: Select multiple content → approve/reject tất cả. Cho queue lớn.
Note:
- Multi-select (checkbox + shift-click)
- Bulk approve: confirm dialog → approve all
- Bulk reject: chọn chung 1 reason → apply all
- Progress indicator cho bulk operations
- Undo window (5 giây) sau bulk action

Use case: Cấu hình auto-reject per campaign: video quá ngắn, thiếu hashtag, sai platform.
Note:
- Rule engine: conditions → auto-reject
- VD: video_duration < 10s, missing_hashtag, wrong_platform
- Per campaign configurable (Local Admin setup)
- Auto-reject → notification to creator với lý do
- Override: Ops có thể manually approve auto-rejected content

Use case: Report content vi phạm: spam, fake views, inappropriate content.
Note:
- Report button on content review
- Violation categories: spam, fake, inappropriate, copyright
- Escalate to Local Admin nếu nghiêm trọng
- Track reported content history

Use case: Queue KYC pending review. Xem documents, approve/reject.
Note:
- Queue sortable: oldest first (FIFO), priority
- Filter: status, document type, date
- Count hiển thị: "18 KYC chờ duyệt"

Use case: Xem KYC documents: gov ID, bank info, tax ID. Access logged vì sensitive.
Note:
- Document viewer (image zoom, rotate)
- Side-by-side: submitted info vs document
- Sensitive data access → auto-log (actor, timestamp, document type)
- Visual indicator: "Bạn đang xem dữ liệu nhạy cảm"

Use case: Approve KYC hoặc reject với lý do cụ thể. Cho creator re-submit phần bị reject.
Note:
- Approve: confirm → status = approved → notification
- Reject: bắt buộc lý do per field (ảnh mờ, sai thông tin, ...)
- Partial reject: chỉ reject field cụ thể → creator re-submit field đó
- Re-submission tracking: lần thứ mấy, history

Use case: Danh sách creators trong country. Search, filter, sort.
Note:
- Country-scoped (bắt buộc)
- Search: tên, email, phone, referral code
- Filter: KYC status, campaign, earnings range, active/suspended
- Sort: newest, earnings, content count
- Pagination + export to CSV

Use case: Chi tiết creator: profile, social accounts, KYC status, campaigns, earnings, content history.
Note:
- Profile info: name, avatar, social links, joined date
- KYC status + documents (access logged)
- Campaigns tham gia: active + completed
- Earnings summary
- Content history: submitted, approved, rejected
- Activity timeline

Use case: Ban hoặc suspend creator. Bắt buộc lý do + audit log.
Note:
- Suspend: tạm ngưng (có thể reactivate)
- Ban: vĩnh viễn (settle earnings trước)
- Bắt buộc lý do (predefined + custom)
- Notification to creator
- Audit log: ai ban, lý do, timestamp
- Reactivate flow (Ops hoặc Admin)

Use case: Gửi notification cho creators trong country: all hoặc targeted.
Note:
- Target: all creators, by campaign, by status, custom list
- Content: title + message (đa ngôn ngữ)
- Channels: in-app, email
- Schedule: send now hoặc schedule
- History: sent notifications + delivery status

Use case: Local Ops chỉ thấy data country mình. KHÔNG xem được country khác.
Note:
- Middleware enforce country_code filter
- UI: không hiển thị country selector
- API: reject requests cho country khác
- Integration test: verify data isolation
- This is NOT a separate feature — built into all Ops features above. Estimate = QC testing effort.

Use case: Tạo batch đối soát: chọn period, campaigns, review earnings overview.
Note:
- Chọn date range (period)
- Chọn campaigns (all hoặc specific)
- Auto-calculate: total earnings, creator count, content count
- Preview tổng trước khi proceed
- Status: draft → under_review → approved → paid

Use case: Chốt tỷ giá khi đối soát. Accept suggested hoặc nhập manual (bắt buộc reason). Immutable sau confirm.
Note:
- Suggest: current realtime rate
- Manual: nhập rate + bắt buộc reason
- Validation: manual rate phải trong ±5% so với realtime → nếu ngoài → warning + double confirm
- Preview: total payment amount VỚI rate sẽ chốt
- 2-step: review → confirm → LOCK (immutable)
- Audit: ai chốt, rate, source, reason

Use case: Review chi tiết earnings trong batch: per creator, per campaign, per content.
Note:
- Table: creator, campaign, content count, gross earnings, tax, net
- Drill-down: click creator → xem từng content
- Highlight anomalies: earnings đột biến, unusual patterns
- Export detail to Excel

Use case: Approve batch → lock calculations. Sau approve: rate + earnings IMMUTABLE.
Note:
- Review summary: total, rate, creator count
- Approve button + confirmation dialog
- Sau approve: batch locked, không thể edit
- Sai → tạo adjustment batch mới (không sửa batch cũ)
- Audit: ai approve, timestamp

Use case: Lịch sử các batch đối soát. Filter, search, export.
Note:
- List batches: date, status, total, rate, approver
- Filter: status, date range, campaign
- Export: Excel, PDF
- Click → xem detail

Use case: Danh sách payments cần execute từ batch đã approve.
Note:
- Queue từ approved reconciliation batches
- Per creator: amount, bank/wallet, status
- Prioritize: oldest batch first
- Batch execute option

Use case: Trigger payment transfer: bank transfer hoặc e-wallet per country.
Note:
- Execute per creator hoặc bulk execute
- Payment gateway integration per country
- VN: bank transfer
- PH: bank transfer + GCash
- Confirmation dialog trước execute
- Auto-retry configurable (1-3 times)

Use case: Trạng thái payment per creator: pending, processing, completed, failed.
Note:
- Realtime status tracking (webhook from payment gateway)
- Status: pending → processing → completed/failed
- Failed: reason + retry button + manual resolve option
- Notification to creator khi completed
- Dashboard: success rate, avg processing time

Use case: Xử lý payment thất bại: retry, manual resolve, refund to balance.
Note:
- Retry: auto hoặc manual trigger
- Manual resolve: nhập reference number khi transfer qua kênh khác
- Refund to balance: hoàn lại balance creator nếu không thể pay
- Escalate to Local Admin nếu cần
- All actions logged

Use case: Lịch sử payment đầy đủ. Filter, search, export.
Note:
- Filter: status, date, creator, batch, amount range
- Export: Excel, CSV
- Per payment: amount, bank, reference, status, timestamp
- Reconcile with bank statements

Use case: Dashboard doanh thu: local currency + USD reference. Confirmed vs estimated.
Note:
- Revenue summary: confirmed (chốt rate) vs estimated (realtime)
- Visual phân biệt: confirmed (text đen) vs estimated (xám + ~)
- Currency: local primary, USD reference
- Period: daily, weekly, monthly, custom
- Charts: trend lines

Use case: Tổng thuế đã khấu trừ per period. Per country tax rules.
Note:
- Total tax withheld per period
- Breakdown per tax type (income tax, withholding)
- Per creator summary
- Export cho government filing

Use case: Export tax summary per creator per year — cho creator khai thuế.
Note:
- Per creator: total gross, total tax, total net
- Per year breakdown
- Export PDF (per creator hoặc bulk)
- Template per country tax authority format

Use case: Xem rate history + rates đã chốt trong past reconciliations.
Note:
- Current realtime rate
- Historical chart (daily)
- Rates chốt per batch (labeled)
- Compare: chốt rate vs realtime rate at time of lock

Use case: Revenue, payouts, tax trends over time.
Note:
- Line/bar charts: revenue, payouts, tax
- Granularity: daily, weekly, monthly
- Compare periods
- Export charts

Use case: Tạo campaign: brand, reward, rules, deadline, content requirements. Đa ngôn ngữ.
Note:
- Campaign form: name, brand, description, reward structure, rules, deadline
- Multilingual content (local + EN) — tab/switch per language
- Content requirements: format, duration, platforms, hashtags
- Image upload: banner, brand logo
- Save draft / Submit for review

Use case: Draft → Review → Active → Paused → Closed. State machine.
Note:
- Status flow: draft → pending_review → active → paused → closed
- Transitions: chỉ allowed state changes
- Review: Local Admin approve trước khi active
- Pause/Resume: tạm dừng campaign khi cần
- Auto-close khi deadline passed hoặc budget cap

Use case: Cấu hình reward: per view, per post, bonus tiers. Tiền tệ local.
Note:
- Reward types: per_view, per_post, per_engagement, bonus_tier
- Bonus tiers: milestone-based (>1000 views → bonus)
- Currency: local currency (from Country Config)
- Budget estimation: estimated total cost
- Editable khi campaign còn draft/paused

Use case: Budget cap per campaign. Warning ở 90%, chặn submissions khi vượt.
Note:
- Set budget cap (local currency)
- Real-time tracking: budget used vs budget cap
- Alert: 75% → yellow, 90% → red warning
- Auto-pause campaign khi 100% budget
- Override: Admin có thể increase budget

Use case: Duplicate campaign với modifications. Tạo campaign tương tự nhanh.
Note:
- Clone from existing campaign
- Pre-fill all fields
- Editable: change dates, budget, specific fields
- New campaign ID

Use case: Dashboard per campaign: creators, content, views, earnings, budget.
Note:
- Metrics: creators joined, content submitted, approved/rejected, views, earnings
- Budget used vs cap
- Charts: timeline, breakdown by platform
- Export to Excel

Use case: Quản lý partners trong country: branding, landing page, campaign assignment.
Note:
- Partner list per country
- Partner config: name, logo, branding colors, landing page
- Assign campaigns to partner
- Partner-scoped analytics

Use case: Analytics per partner: creators, campaigns, revenue scoped by partner.
Note:
- Dashboard per partner
- Metrics: creators, campaigns, content, revenue
- Compare partners within country

Use case: Invite admin staff vào local team. Assign role (ops, finance).
Note:
- Invite by email
- Assign role: local_ops, local_finance
- Invitation link with expiry
- Welcome email with getting started guide
- Max staff per role configurable

Use case: Remove/deactivate staff. View team activity log.
Note:
- Staff list: name, role, status, last active
- Deactivate: revoke access immediately
- Remove: delete account
- Activity log per staff member
- Audit: who changed roles, when

Use case: Overview KPIs: creators, campaigns, content, revenue. Charts.
Note:
- KPIs: total creators, active campaigns, content this month, revenue
- Charts: creator growth, content volume, revenue trend
- Comparison: this month vs last month
- Quick links to key actions per role

Use case: Thống kê moderation: approval rate, avg review time, queue size.
Note:
- Approval rate (%)
- Average review time
- Queue size trend
- Ops performance (nếu nhiều Ops)

Use case: Quản lý CMS content: T&C, articles, guides, FAQ — đa ngôn ngữ.
Note:
- Content types: T&C, articles, guides, FAQ, announcements
- Multilingual editor (tab per language)
- Rich text editor (WYSIWYG)
- Preview before publish
- Versioning: save history, rollback
- T&C: bắt buộc manual nhập (không AI translate)

Use case: Quản lý notification templates đa ngôn ngữ: campaign, payment, KYC notifications.
Note:
- Template per notification type per language
- Variables: {creator_name}, {campaign_name}, {amount}, etc.
- Preview with sample data
- Test send

Use case: Import creators từ CSV. Auto-create accounts nếu chưa có.
Note:
- Upload CSV file
- Validation: required fields, format check
- Preview: show errors before import
- Auto-create user identity + country profile
- Report: success/failed count, error details

Use case: Export creators, campaigns, content, earnings to Excel/CSV.
Note:
- Export types: creators, campaigns, content, earnings, reconciliation
- Format: Excel, CSV
- Filters: date range, status, campaign
- Async export cho data lớn (email link khi done)

Use case: Local Admin KHÔNG xem được data country khác.
Note:
- Same middleware as Ops (ADR-001)
- Country selector: chỉ hiển thị country mình
- Tất cả API responses scoped by country
- Integration test: verify isolation
- This is NOT a separate feature — built into all Admin features above. Estimate = QC testing effort.

Use case: Dashboard tổng hợp all countries. Revenue USD. Creators, campaigns per country.
Note:
- Summary cards: total revenue (USD), total creators, total campaigns
- Per country breakdown table
- Charts: revenue per country, creator growth per country
- Trend: this month vs last month
- Anomaly alerts: spike/drop per country

Use case: Revenue chia rõ: confirmed (chốt rate) vs estimated (realtime rate).
Note:
- Confirmed: dựa trên reconciliation batches đã approve
- Estimated: dựa trên realtime rate × pending earnings
- Visual: confirmed = solid, estimated = dashed/grey
- Tooltip: giải thích sự khác biệt

Use case: So sánh performance giữa các countries: revenue, creators, content.
Note:
- Bar/line charts: revenue, creators, content by country
- Time range: weekly, monthly, quarterly
- Metrics selector: choose what to compare
- Export charts

Use case: Click country → xem chi tiết như Local Admin view.
Note:
- Click country card → navigate to country detail
- View = Local Admin dashboard (read-only unless acting as local)
- Breadcrumb: Global > Country Name

Use case: Switch scope sang 1 country để thao tác. Bắt buộc reason. Visual indicator.
Note:
- Select country → enter "acting as local" mode
- Bắt buộc nhập reason (text, min 10 chars)
- Visual indicator rõ: banner "Acting as [Philippines]" (red/orange)
- Session logged: start time, reason
- Inherit Local Admin permissions for that country

Feature: [Global] Acting as Local — Audit & Sensitive Data
Use case: Mọi action logged. Sensitive data (KYC/bank) cần additional confirmation.
Note:
- ALL actions in acting-as-local → special audit category
- Sensitive data access (KYC, bank) → additional confirmation dialog
- Confirmation: "Bạn đang xem KYC data của creator Philippines. Xác nhận?"
- Session summary: khi exit mode → show summary of all actions taken
- Local Admin có thể xem: ai đã act-as-local trong country mình

Use case: Thoát acting-as-local. Show session summary.
Note:
- Exit button always visible khi đang in mode
- Session summary: duration, actions count, categories
- Auto-exit after configurable timeout (default 30 min)
- Log: exit time, total duration

Use case: CRUD country config: currency, languages, tax rules, KYC requirements, payment, social platforms.
Note:
- Form per country: all configurable fields
- Currency, languages[], tax_rules{}, kyc_requirements{}
- Payment gateway config per country
- Social platforms per country
- Feature flags per country → link to Feature Flags UI
- All changes → audit log

Use case: Bật/tắt tính năng per country. Percentage rollout. Audit log.
Note:
- Flag list: name, status per country, description
- Toggle: enabled, disabled, percentage rollout
- Scope: global, per-country
- History: changes per flag
- Audit: who changed, when, from → to

Use case: Tạo Local Admin accounts per country. Assign/revoke roles.
Note:
- Create admin: email, name, role, country
- Assign role: global_admin, local_admin, local_finance, local_ops
- 1 admin = 1 country (local roles)
- Deactivate/reactivate admin
- List all admins: filter by country, role, status
- All changes → audit log

Use case: Xem permission matrix: role × resource × action. Config nếu cần.
Note:
- Matrix view: role vs resource (campaigns, content, KYC, payment, config)
- Actions: view, create, edit, delete, approve
- Read-only default (hardcoded roles) hoặc configurable
- Export matrix for compliance

Use case: Xem audit log toàn hệ thống. Search, filter, paginated.
Note:
- Search: keyword, actor name
- Filter: country, role, action type, date range
- Special filter: "acting as local" sessions
- Pagination + infinite scroll
- Detail view: full context per audit entry

Use case: Xem riêng các session acting-as-local: ai, country nào, khi nào, làm gì.
Note:
- Session list: admin, country, start/end, reason, action count
- Drill-down: xem từng action trong session
- Export sessions
- Alert nếu session bất thường (quá dài, quá nhiều sensitive data access)

Use case: Export audit logs to CSV/Excel. Filter trước khi export.
Note:
- Apply filters → export kết quả
- Formats: CSV, Excel
- Large exports: async + email link
- Audit retention: configurable (default 1 year)

Use case: Gửi notification cho Local Admin teams. Target by country/role. Scheduled.
Note:
- Target: all teams, specific country, specific role
- Content: title + message (multilingual)
- Schedule: send now hoặc schedule
- History: sent, delivered, read status

Use case: Revenue, creators, content comparison across countries. Export.
Note:
- Report types: revenue, creators, campaigns, content, payouts
- Comparison: country vs country
- Time range: monthly, quarterly, yearly
- Export: Excel, PDF
- Scheduled reports (email digest)

Use case: Quản lý tax rules per country. Update rates. Audit log.
Note:
- Tax rules per country: rate, bands, withholding type
- CRUD: create/update rules (Global Admin only)
- Effective date: new rules apply from specific date
- History: all changes logged
- Impact preview: simulate tax change impact

Use case: System health: API latency, errors, per country metrics.
Note:
- API latency per country (avg, p95, p99)
- Error rate per country
- Active users (admin + creators)
- Infrastructure: CPU, memory, DB connections
- Alerting: threshold-based per metric
